issue.title: yandex.ru
issue.body:
### Issue URL (Ads) [https://yandex.ru/search/?from=chromesearch&text=%D0%90%D0%BB%D0%B8%D1%81%D0%B0+%D0%BA%D0%B0%D0%BA+%D1%8E%D1%80%D0%B8%D1%81%D1%82&lr=213](https://adguardteam.github.io/AnonymousRedirect/redirect.html?url=https%3A%2F%2Fyandex.ru%2Fsearch%2F%3Ffrom%3Dchromesearch%26text%3D%25D0%2590%25D0%25BB%25D0%25B8%25D1%2581%25D0%25B0%2B%25D0%25BA%25D0%25B0%25D0%25BA%2B%25D1%258E%25D1%2580%25D0%25B8%25D1%2581%25D1%2582%26lr%3D213) ### Comment > Последнее время в поиске Яндекса стало появляться очень много результатов в первых строчках выдачи с пометкой «Промо». Иногда доходит до абсурда и первые 5 результатов это могут быть вот такие рекламные ссылки ``` Username: @aturtsev ``` ### Screenshots
Screenshot 1 ![Screenshot 1](https://cdn.adguardcdn.com/sitereports/os7stn9mkg00k4c408c40c08c000s0cq3i6tq1ng00.png?nc=1)
### System configuration | Information | Value | |-------------|-------| AdGuard product: | AdGuard for Mac v2.18.0.2089 release System version: | `MacOS 26.5.1 (Выпуск 25F80)` Browser: | Chrome Filters: | **Ad Blocking:**
AdGuard Base filter

**Privacy:**
AdGuard Tracking Protection filter,
AdGuard URL Tracking filter,
EasyPrivacy

**Annoyances:**
AdGuard Cookie Notices filter,
AdGuard Popups filter,
AdGuard Other Annoyances filter,
EasyList Cookie List

**Security:**
Online Malicious URL Blocklist,
Phishing URL Blocklist,
Scam Blocklist by DurableNapkin,
uBlock Origin – Badware risks

**Language-specific:**
AdGuard Russian filter Tracking protection: | **General**:
Block trackers,
Strip URLs from tracking parameters,
Hide your search queries,
Send Do-Not-Track header

**Browser API**:
Block Java

**Miscellaneous**:
Remove X-Client-Data header from HTTP requests DNS filtering: | disabled Browsing Security: | enabled Browsing Security statistics: | disabled Userscripts: | `AdGuard Extra (url: https://userscripts.adtidy.org/release/adguard-extra/1.0/adguard-extra.user.js)` Userstyles: | disabled ### Issue configuration [Import](https://reports.adguard.com/settings/import.html?product_type=mac&product_version=2.18.0.2089+release&system_version=MacOS+26.5.1+%28%D0%92%D1%8B%D0%BF%D1%83%D1%81%D0%BA+25F80%29&browser=chrome&filters=1.2.3.17.18.19.21.118.208.241.255.256.257&dns.servers=System&userscripts=AdGuard%2520Extra%2520%28url%253A%2520https%253A%252F%252Fuserscripts.adtidy.org%252Frelease%252Fadguard-extra%252F1.0%252Fadguard-extra.user.js%29&dns.filters=&dns.filters_enabled=false&dns.enabled=false&browsing_security.enabled=true&browsing_security.statistics_enabled=false&stealth.enabled=true&stealth.webrtc=false&stealth.push=false&stealth.location=false&stealth.java=true&stealth.strip_url=true&stealth.hide_search_queries=true&stealth.DNT=true&stealth.referrer=&stealth.x_client=true&stealth.dpi=false&stealth.disable_third_party_cache=false&stealth.block_third_party_auth=false&stealth.block_trackers=true&referrer=&scheme_version=3&adblocking.enabled=true&dns.timeout=2000)

issue.title: yandex.ru
issue.body:
### Issue URL (Ads) [https://yandex.ru/search/?from=chromesearch&text=%D0%90%D0%BB%D0%B8%D1%81%D0%B0+%D0%BA%D0%B0%D0%BA+%D1%8E%D1%80%D0%B8%D1%81%D1%82&lr=213](https://adguardteam.github.io/AnonymousRedirect/redirect.html?url=https%3A%2F%2Fyandex.ru%2Fsearch%2F%3Ffrom%3Dchromesearch%26text%3D%25D0%2590%25D0%25BB%25D0%25B8%25D1%2581%25D0%25B0%2B%25D0%25BA%25D0%25B0%25D0%25BA%2B%25D1%258E%25D1%2580%25D0%25B8%25D1%2581%25D1%2582%26lr%3D213) ### Comment > Последнее время в поиске Яндекса стало появляться очень много результатов в первых строчках выдачи с пометкой «Промо». Иногда доходит до абсурда и первые 5 результатов это могут быть вот такие рекламные ссылки ``` Username: @aturtsev ``` ### Screenshots
Screenshot 1 ![Screenshot 1](https://cdn.adguardcdn.com/sitereports/os7stn9mkg00k4c408c40c08c000s0cq3i6tq1ng00.png?nc=1)
### System configuration | Information | Value | |-------------|-------| AdGuard product: | AdGuard for Mac v2.18.0.2089 release System version: | `MacOS 26.5.1 (Выпуск 25F80)` Browser: | Chrome Filters: | **Ad Blocking:**
AdGuard Base filter

**Privacy:**
AdGuard Tracking Protection filter,
AdGuard URL Tracking filter,
EasyPrivacy

**Annoyances:**
AdGuard Cookie Notices filter,
AdGuard Popups filter,
AdGuard Other Annoyances filter,
EasyList Cookie List

**Security:**
Online Malicious URL Blocklist,
Phishing URL Blocklist,
Scam Blocklist by DurableNapkin,
uBlock Origin – Badware risks

**Language-specific:**
AdGuard Russian filter Tracking protection: | **General**:
Block trackers,
Strip URLs from tracking parameters,
Hide your search queries,
Send Do-Not-Track header

**Browser API**:
Block Java

**Miscellaneous**:
Remove X-Client-Data header from HTTP requests DNS filtering: | disabled Browsing Security: | enabled Browsing Security statistics: | disabled Userscripts: | `AdGuard Extra (url: https://userscripts.adtidy.org/release/adguard-extra/1.0/adguard-extra.user.js)` Userstyles: | disabled ### Issue configuration [Import](https://reports.adguard.com/settings/import.html?product_type=mac&product_version=2.18.0.2089+release&system_version=MacOS+26.5.1+%28%D0%92%D1%8B%D0%BF%D1%83%D1%81%D0%BA+25F80%29&browser=chrome&filters=1.2.3.17.18.19.21.118.208.241.255.256.257&dns.servers=System&userscripts=AdGuard%2520Extra%2520%28url%253A%2520https%253A%252F%252Fuserscripts.adtidy.org%252Frelease%252Fadguard-extra%252F1.0%252Fadguard-extra.user.js%29&dns.filters=&dns.filters_enabled=false&dns.enabled=false&browsing_security.enabled=true&browsing_security.statistics_enabled=false&stealth.enabled=true&stealth.webrtc=false&stealth.push=false&stealth.location=false&stealth.java=true&stealth.strip_url=true&stealth.hide_search_queries=true&stealth.DNT=true&stealth.referrer=&stealth.x_client=true&stealth.dpi=false&stealth.disable_third_party_cache=false&stealth.block_third_party_auth=false&stealth.block_trackers=true&referrer=&scheme_version=3&adblocking.enabled=true&dns.timeout=2000)

labels.name: A: Cannot reproduce
labels.description: Filters devs cannot reproduce this issue

labels.name: A: In progress
labels.description: Work on the issue is in progress
